companies.name: Spruce Technologies
companies.domain: Public sector software delivery for NYC municipal departments
companies.context: Delivered .NET Core solutions for NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene and Department of Education. Government compliance, data integrity, and security were primary concerns.

companies.name: NRG (formerly Direct Energy)
companies.domain: Retail energy billing, CIS/CRM, B2B and residential customer management
companies.context: Large-scale financial transaction processing — billing millions of customers across 15 states with 100s of utility integrations. High-volume data exchange via EDI. Operationally similar to FinTech in terms of financial data accuracy, regulatory compliance, and transaction scale.

companies.name: UPS (Consultant for Avanade)
companies.context: Enterprise-scale logistics platform. Managed onshore and offshore teams delivering global operations software integrating with MQSeries messaging infrastructure.

companies.name: KPMG (Consultant to FTE)
companies.domain: Big 4 accounting, audit, tax, and advisory firm
companies.context: Financial services environment — audit, tax, and advisory for major corporations. Built internal platforms used across the firm. Directly adjacent to FinTech and financial domain work.

companies.name: Presidential Life Insurance Company
companies.domain: Life insurance policy management and corporate governance
companies.context: Financial services company. Built Board of Directors portal and data validation systems for financial recordkeeping. Insurance is a regulated financial services sector.

companies.name: Perry Systems, Inc
companies.context: High-throughput CMS optimization — scaled to 2 million requests per hour. Short-term engagement focused on performance and offshore team leadership.

companies.name: Thomson Group
companies.domain: Corporate tax workflow automation and financial data management
companies.context: Built a SaaS corporate workflow tax application — directly in the financial/tax domain. Multi-tenant product serving corporate clients with complex tax processing and financial data needs. Financial services environment with strict data accuracy requirements.

companies.name: Mr Brooks Products and Services
companies.domain: AI-assisted web and SaaS product development
companies.context: Freelance development using generative AI tooling (Claude, Cursor, Kilocode) to build modern web applications with PostgreSQL, React, Node, Docker, and MongoDB.
